title: malapoenna citrata
intro: Malapoenna citrata, also known as the citron balm or lemon balm of the West Indies, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family, characterized by its citrus-scented leaves and clusters of small white or yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving digestive issues. The health benefits of Malapoenna citrata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, as well as providing relief from headaches and menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be easily made at home using the leaves of the plant.
